content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — demo credentials are present (reviewer@focusshield.example / Gv7kQz2mNp) but notes.txt only contains "n/a", giving reviewers no explanation of how to reach the subscription paywall or core blocking/reports features (fastlane/metadata/review_information/notes.txt).
Pierre: Apple reviewers need explicit steps to unlock gated functionality, especially when a subscription paywall (App/PaywallView.swift) sits behind login — without notes, reviewers may not know how to test blocking/schedules/reports and could reject for insufficient information under 2.1. Since credentials exist but are unexplained, replace "n/a" with concrete steps: log in with the provided account, note whether the subscription is pre-activated for the reviewer or how to bypass/simulate purchase, and describe how to reach each core feature (App blocking, schedules, reports).
